name: @rhombus-std/di.extras.options
description: A @rhombus-std/di.extras satellite: the type-only declare-module for the addOptions<T>() sugar plus its rhombus.inline body. A Go/ttsc descriptor package — the sugar is substituted from its inline body (this.addOptions(tokenfor(IOptions<T>), tokenfor(T))) and lowered by the shared owner binary's inline + tokenfor stages.
//rhombus.inline: The addOptions<T>() sugar's inline publish list. The body lives in src/inline.ts (authoring-only substitution source, kept out of the barrel + dist); the inline stage side-parses it and substitutes at consumer call sites, then the tokenfor stage lowers the composed IOptions<T> + bare T tokens. The `type` ANCHOR is the di.core IServiceManifestBase interface (the augmentation target); `impl` (ServiceOptionsInline) resolves in THIS package — tokenfor is the runtime-leaf primitive and IOptions the peered @rhombus-std/options type the composed wrapper derives over.
